morning_brief.preview:
---
# EverPass Morning Brief — Friday, June 5, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive

1. **CHARTER — EP LEGAL PASS + CONFIRMATION TO TAYLOR HOLDEN — DUE TODAY**
   Counter received 6/5. Near-clean: sole material Charter insertion is §III.b FCO Documentation paragraph (good-faith/past-practice softening; EP Snapshot obligation survives re-lettered as §III.c). EP legal must confirm "commercially reasonable advance notice" in Exhibit E and §III.b additive-re language, then send alignment confirmation to Taylor Holden (Taylor.Holden@spectrum.com).
   **Deadline: EP legal pass + confirmation to Taylor Holden today. Clean execution target June 9. 10 days to June 15 Mission Control.**

2. **TWDC McINTOSH SPRINT 4 — 10 DAYS TO JUNE 15 MISSION CONTROL**
   Disney's 5/29 counter reverted to Track A (all ABC affiliates + full ESPN suite; games-only rejected). Four unresolved gaps: (a) SMB margin $0 at $164/mo, (b) 115% venue-sizing uplift, (c) Venue Auth Standard rejected, (d) 200+ ABC feeds scope. Sprint 4 redlines not yet staged.
   **Deadline: Stage Sprint 4 redlines TODAY. June 15 = hard close. Cannot slip.**

3. **ACCUWEATHER — CONFIRMATION EMAIL TO McCORMACK — 5TH CONSECUTIVE CARRY**
   READY TO SIGN. Single blocking action: send confirmation email to Patrick McCormack (Patrick.McCormack@accuweather.com) confirming three pre-execution items (incl. Exhibit D) so DocuSign can issue to Kaplan. No new decision needed — operator PASS logged 5/19.
   **Deadline: Email sent today. Absolute final carry.**

4. **VICTORY+ WNBA — ZIP/DMA LIST + CEO-TO-CEO EXECUTION — CARRIED FROM 6/4**
   Amendment READY TO SIGN. WNBA local delivery hard-gated on Club zip/DMA list delivery to Neil Gruninger. Confirm §3(b) MFN intent with EP counsel if not yet done. Route for Kaplan/Gruninger CEO-to-CEO execution.
   **Deadline: Zip/DMA list to Gruninger + execution routing today. No further slip.**

5. **MARQUEE — GO/NO-GO TO LEE SCHLAZER — OVERDUE (WEEK 10+)**
   Kaplan signed execution copy; Marquee counter-signature pending Ryan's go/no-go communication to Lee Schlazer. NLM W23 flagged critical. No logged decision on record. Packaging removed per Sinclair redline 4/3.
   **Deadline: Communicate go/no-go to Lee Schlazer today.**

6. **CHSN — SECTION 5(e) LAPSED ~68 DAYS; NO CURE PATH ON RECORD**
   Section 5(e) lapsed ~March 29, 2026. No confirmed cure path, outside counsel escalation, or logged decision on record.
   **Deadline: Decide today — cure vs. escalate to outside counsel. Log decision in cockpit.**

7. **DIRECTV — C&D ACTIVE 42+ DAYS; MAY 26 MEETING OUTCOME UNLOGGED**
   Net underpayment $2,634,239.50; $65M second payment outstanding. May 26 meeting outcome still not logged. Kelley Drye demand letter send date unconfirmed.
   **Deadline: Log May 26 outcome in cockpit today. Confirm Kelley Drye send date.**

8. **MEDIACOM — FOLLOW-UP CALL TODAY (TAPAN DANDNAIK, MARK FINCH)**
   Noah Fischbach recap email received: Mediacom reaches ~3.2M homes; three paths forward identified. Call is live on today's calendar.
   **Deadline: Attend call; log outcome + next action in cockpit today.**

9. **TASK SCHEDULER — 25TH CONSECUTIVE OVERNIGHT MISS**
   Auto-pipeline broken since 2026-05-19. new_learnings.md absent 37 nights. gws dead 34+ days. Dashboard stale. Ryan flagged: "pipeline state hasn't been refreshed in a month."
   **Deadline: Escalate to eng for same-day repair. Cannot carry to week 6.**

items.text: EverPass Is Not Exclusive for Small Venues; Effective Exclusivity Exists at Scale — DIRECTV FOR BUSINESS simultaneously distributes Apple TV F1, MLS, and MLB Friday Night Baseball to 300,000+ commercial venues; however, DIRECTV streaming has a 20-TV cap, mean…
New intro: Casino-driven intro; parties connecting on possible partnership
Near close: EP leadership to call Charter directly on the FCO snapshot (board visibility); confirm 2 minor items; circulate execution copy

Per-Event Fee Is $1,800 Up to 1,500 Concurrent Endpoints; Annual Service Fee Is $30,000 — Fixed fees: one-time activation fee of $20,000; annual service fee of $30,000; variable fees: $1,800 per live event (up to 1,500 concurrent delivery endpoints per event)…

Day-1 Dish Partnership Exploration Held — Charter-Parallel Model Receptive — First substantive packaging conversation between EP and Dish Business. Attendees: Andy, Kate (Dish); Ryan Blood, Alex Kaplan (EP). Sling Orange commercialization path closed by Dish…

COUNTERPARTY RISK — Dish DBS preparing Chapter 11 (WSJ via The Desk 6/29; filing as soon as this week after missed June 1 debt repayment). Hold, do not advance, the Dish Business partnership exploration until the petition posts and the debtor's commercial/packaging intentions and decision owners are clear. No pre-petition commitments or term exchange. Monitor-only. See data/insights/2026-06-30-market-intel-dish-dbs-chapter-11.md.
Negotiating: Parties connecting to confirm the potential MG direction

No Deal in Place; FOX Is the Only Major Broadcast Sports Provider Without an EverPass Agreement — FOX verbally committed EverPass as preferred commercial launch partner for Fox One DTC in July 2025; discussions stalled in November 2025 with no formal response…

Economics Gap: Zero-Fee vs. Paid-Per-Sub — EverPass proposes zero license fee with ad pass-through as consideration; Scripps Term Sheet requires paid per-sub fees at a rate card not yet provided. Neither side has moved and no counterpart economic draft exists.

bridge_signals.title: [market-intel] Dish DBS (Dish Network / Sling TV parent) preparing Chapter 11
bridge_signals.summary: WSJ (via The Desk, 6/29): Dish DBS — Echostar's pay-TV + Boost Mobile subsidiary — is preparing a Chapter 11 filing as soon as this week after missing a June 1 debt repayment amid FCC build-out scrutiny. Counterparty flag on the open Dish Business partnership exploration: hold, do not advance, until the petition posts and the debtor's commercial/packaging intentions are visible.
key_points: Sling Orange commercial path already closed by Dish
